commands.review_summary:
Adds a Convex GitHub App install, webhook, and repository-sync backend for source-managed skills, including new schema tables, source publish enforcement, helper tests, generated API typing, and an internal spec.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new feature PR, not a bug report. The changed behavior should be validated with a real GitHub App install, webhook claim, repository enablement, and pinned-commit sync publish, but that proof is not present yet.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This needs human maintainer review for proof, security, compatibility, and rollout acceptance rather than cleanup closure or automated repair.

target.title: feat: GitHub App source-controlled skill sync
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a GitHub App install/setup flow for publishers with HMAC-signed setup state, single-use state consumption, webhook signature verification, and installation webhook claims for org-account handshakes.
- Add repository links, source-link mappings, sync jobs, webhook delivery tracking, and source-managed publish enforcement so only linked skills sync while manual org skills remain untouched.
- Add repository sync from pinned GitHub archive commits, push-job coalescing/serialization, repository removal/rename handling, and source provenance checks.
- Document the source-management invariants and GitHub App operational setup in `specs/github-app-skill-sync.md`.

## GitHub App setup notes

Required env:

- `GITHUB_APP_ID`
- `GITHUB_APP_SLUG`
- `GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY`
- `GITHUB_APP_WEBHOOK_SECRET`
- optional `GITHUB_APP_STATE_SECRET`

App permissions/events:

- Contents: read-only
- Metadata: read-only
- Webhook URL: `/api/webhooks/github-app`
- Events: `push`, `installation`, `installation_repositories`, `repository`

Repository links are disabled by default after installation until an org admin enables sync. Org install completion requires a signed GitHub installation webhook claim matching the current user's GitHub account; if the redirect beats the webhook, retry completion after the webhook arrives.

## Tests run so far

- `bunx vitest run convex/lib/githubAppSync.test.ts`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`

## Still running / follow-up on this PR

- Re-run autoreview after the latest accepted fixes.
- Run full pre-handoff gates: `bun run ci:static`, `bun run ci:unit`, `bun run ci:types-build`.
- `bunx convex codegen` was blocked locally by missing Convex deployment/login config; generated API typing was updated manually and verified by TypeScript/build checks.
